titleStmt.title: SII 39.79: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 79. (A.R. No. 79 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ-15TH YEAR (1231 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of 2 vēli taxfree lands to the temple officials (Dāṉattār) by one Tamil Tallavaraiyaṉ, the resident of Rājavallapuram of Kīḻvēmbanāḍu for the maintenance of newly installed deity Āluḍaiyanāchchiyār in the temple of Śivadharmīśvaramuḍaiyār at Tirukkōlakkuḍi in Puramalaināḍu. This transcation was done as instructed by the son-in-law of Kulaśēkhadēvar. (See No. 78 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirabhuvaṉa cakravatti ko
neriṉmai koṇṭāṉ puṟa
malaināṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi śi
vadharmmiśvaramuṭaiyār koyiṟt
tāṉattārkku kiḻvempa nāṭṭu
rājavallapurattu Uṭaiyāṉ U
vāṟuṇantāṉāṉa tamiḻpal
lavaraiyaṉ Ikkoyiṟ tirukkā
makkoṭṭattukku Eḻuntaruḷivi
tta Āḷuṭaiya nācci
yārkku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu
veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku
kāṉa nāṭṭu kumāttakkuṭi nāṉ
kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil
Ivvūrt tāṉtonṟiśvaramuṭai
yār tevatāna nilam kālum kāṉa
ṉāṭṭu viṇṇakara Āḻvār nila
m Irumāvaraiyum Āka nilam
Eḻumāvaraiyum nikki Uḷḷa nila
ttil muṉpu Ivvāḷuṭaiya
nācciyārkku Iṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu
veliyum Uṭppaṭa patiṉ Añcāva
tu mutal Antarāyamum viṉiyoka
mum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili ca
ntuvikkirakappeṟum maṟṟum Ep
peṟpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa tirukkā
makkoṭṭa yiṟaiyiliyāka
yiṟuppatāka Iṭappeṟa
veṇu meṉṟu marumakaṉār kula
cekara tevar namakku coṉṉamai
yil Ivvāḷuṭaiya nācciyāṟkku
tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu
m nivantaṅkaḷukku Ivvūr nāl
kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilattilt tā
ṉtonṟiśvaramuṭaiyār tevatā
ṉa nilaṅkālum kāṉanāṭṭu viṇ
ṇakar Āḻvār tevatāna nilam
Irumāvaraiyum Āka nilam Eḻumā
varaiyum nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilattil
muṉpiṭṭa nilam yiraṇṭu veliyu
m Uṭppaṭa Ivvāṇṭu mutal Anta
rāyamum viṉiyokamum veṭṭipā
ṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakap
peṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭiṉavu
m Uṭpaṭat tirukkāmakkoṭṭappu
ṟam yiṟaiyiliyāy Iṟuppatāka
Iṭṭu variyilār Eḻu
ttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum keḻviyum taramu
coṉṉom yivvāṇṭu mutal
kaikkoṇṭu tiruppaṭi māṟṟu
Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅka
ḷ cella paṇṇi Ippaṭi cantirā
tittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum
cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷkaḥ ....
Digital edition of SII 39.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
